en: This is the third time I am coming to you. Every charge must be established by the evidence of two or three witnesses.
zh: 這是我第三次到你們那裡去，各樣事情必須憑兩三個證人的口，才能確定。

en: I warned those who sinned before and all the others, and I warn them now while absent, as I did when present on my second visit, that if I come again I will not spare them-
zh: 我第二次到你們那裡去的時候說過，現今不在你們那裡，再預先對那些從前犯了罪的和其餘的人說：我若再來，必不寬容，

en: since you seek proof that Christ is speaking in me. He is not weak in dealing with you, but is powerful among you.
zh: 因為你們在找基督藉著我說話的憑據。基督對你們不是軟弱的，相反地，在你們身上是有能力的。

en: For he was crucified in weakness, but lives by the power of God. For we also are weak in him, but in dealing with you we will live with him by the power of God.
zh: 他因著軟弱被釘死了，卻靠著 神的大能活著。我們在他裡面也是軟弱的，但靠著 神向你們所顯的大能，也必與他一同活著。

en: Examine yourselves, to see whether you are in the faith. Test yourselves. Or do you not realize this about yourselves, that Jesus Christ is in you?- unless indeed you fail to meet the test!
zh: 你們應當察驗自己是不是持守著信仰，也應當考驗自己。難道不曉得基督耶穌是在你們裡面嗎？

en: I hope you will find out that we have not failed the test.
zh: 我盼望你們曉得，我們不是經不起考驗的人。

en: But we pray to God that you may not do wrong- not that we may appear to have met the test, but that you may do what is right, though we may seem to have failed.
zh: 我們祈求 神，使你們不作甚麼惡事。這並不是要顯明我們是經得起考驗的，而是要你們行善；我們呢，就讓我們作經不起考驗的人好了！

en: For we cannot do anything against the truth, but only for the truth.
zh: 我們不能作甚麼事違背真理，只能維護真理。

en: For we are glad when we are weak and you are strong. Your restoration is what we pray for.
zh: 當我們軟弱、你們剛強的時候，我們就歡喜；我們所求的，就是要你們完全。

en: For this reason I write these things while I am away from you, that when I come I may not have to be severe in my use of the authority that the Lord has given me for building up and not for tearing down.
zh: 因此，我趁著不在你們那裡的時候，把這些話寫給你們，到我來了，就不必憑著主所給我的權柄嚴厲地對待你們。這權柄不是要拆毀你們，而是要建立你們。

en: Finally, brothers, rejoice. Aim for restoration, comfort one another, agree with one another, live in peace; and the God of love and peace will be with you.
zh: 最後，弟兄們，你們要喜樂，要完全，要受安慰，要同心，要和睦。這樣，施慈愛賜平安的 神必與你們同在。

en: Greet one another with a holy kiss.
zh: 你們要用聖潔的親吻彼此問安。

en: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ and the love of God and the fellowship of the Holy Spirit be with you all.
zh: 願主耶穌基督的恩惠， 神的慈愛，聖靈的契通，常與你們眾人同在。
